channel.title: dyi on alexis lavail
channel.description: Recent content in dyi on alexis lavail

item.title: Standing desk
item.description: For a few years back, I have been doing some work from home, and bought a standard IKEA manual standing desk for the home office. This was a great buy, allowing to have good ergonomy while working at home. When the Covid pandemic started, we ended up being three people working from home, and I wanted a second desk where I could be standing. I decided to buy a Standsome slim, which I got to try by chance in the public library in Karlsruhe where I stopped to work a day during a train trip.
